description: AIR Global PLC manufactures and sells hookah and inhalation products. It sells its products through a B2B e-commerce platform. The company was formerly known as AIR Holdings Limited and changed its name to AIR Global PLC in April 2026. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
